name: Curry Powder#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a blender, process the cumin, fenugreek, mustard, peppercorns, coriander, and poppy seeds until finely ground.
2. Add the remaining spices (ground ginger, hot chili powder, and ground turmeric) to the blender and process again until well combined.
3. Store in an airtight container for up to 3 months.
